indications.text:
Renagel is indicated for the control of serum phosphorus in patients with chronic kidney
disease (CKD) on dialysis. The safety and efficacy of Renagel in CKD patients who are not on
dialysis have not been studied.

Renagel is indicated for the control of serum phosphorus in patients with chronic kidney
disease (CKD) on dialysis. The safety and efficacy of Renagel in CKD patients who are not on
dialysis have not been studied.

Renagel is indicated for the control of serum phosphorus in patients with Chronic Kidney Disease
(CKD) on hemodialysis. The safety and efficacy of Renagel in CKD patients who are not on
hemodialysis have not been studied. In hemodialysis patients, Renagel decreases the incidence of
hypercalcemic epi...

Renagel is indicated for the control of serum phosphorus in patients with chronic kidney
disease (CKD) on dialysis. The safety and efficacy of Renagel in CKD patients who are not on
dialysis have not been studied.

RENAGEL
1
(sevelamer hydrochloride) is indicated for the control of serum phosphorus in
patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD) on dialysis. The safety and efficacy of Renagel in
CKD patients who are not on dialysis have not been studied.
